Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 415.10 Adn Section 418.10
Off Calendar Mar-29-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JOA WELCH's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 415.10 And Section 418.10.

Joa Welch's unopposed motion to quash service of summons and complaint is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
